title: Rewilding debates
script_summary: A brief exploration of the complexities surrounding rewilding debates, emphasizing scientific perspectives and uncertainties.

segments.voiceover: Is rewilding the answer to our environmental crisis? Or a misguided dream?
Rewilding aims to restore ecosystems, but the science is complex and often debated.
Some see it as a chance to revive lost species. Others warn of unintended consequences.
Research shows mixed results. Success stories exist, but failures remind us of the risks.
The truth? Rewilding is not a silver bullet. It's a complex puzzle that needs careful thought.
What do you think? Drop your thoughts below and explore the science of rewilding with us!
